title: Consulting Services Agreement
description: A services agreement for an independent consultant providing defined deliverables to a client.

sections.heading: Engagement
sections.body: {{client_name}} engages {{consultant_name}} to perform the services described in this Agreement beginning on {{start_date}}.

sections.heading: Services
sections.body: The consultant will provide the following services: {{services_description}}.

sections.heading: Fees and Payment
sections.body: The client will pay {{fees}} according to the following payment terms: {{payment_terms}}.

sections.heading: Independent Contractor
sections.body: The consultant is an independent contractor and is not an employee, partner, agent, or joint venturer of the client.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: Unless otherwise agreed in writing, work product specifically created for the client under this Agreement will be assigned to the client upon full payment of undisputed fees.

sections.heading: Confidentiality
sections.body: Each party will protect the other party's confidential information and use it only to perform or receive services under this Agreement.

sections.heading: Term and Termination
sections.body: This Agreement starts on {{effective_date}} and continues until {{end_date}} unless terminated earlier according to its terms.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.body: This Agreement is governed by the laws of {{governing_law}}.

review_notes: Confirm worker classification requirements in the relevant jurisdiction.
Clarify ownership of pre-existing materials and third-party materials.
Add limitation of liability, insurance, tax, and expense clauses as needed.
